{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query is about the AO system of fixation when adequate bone buttressing is present. The AO system is known for its emphasis on load sharing rather than load bearing. Load sharing fixation distributes the load across the bone and fixation device, which is beneficial when the bone quality is good and buttressing is adequate. This reduces the stress on any single point and promotes healing. Therefore, the AO system would suggest load sharing fixation in this scenario.", "answer_choice": "C"}
